productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Printed Cream Belt
description: A classy accessorry, this check belt from lino perros can help you create wonders in your casual wardrobe. Crafted from a leatherette and synthetic twill combination, this belt makes for a stylishly comfortable wear and low on maintenance. Length: 110 cm Made of leatherette with synthetic twill tape that has check print on the upper Tang clasp with five holes One fixed loop and one movable loop to hold the tail in place Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
